title.en: However, in the end, there was no news.

content.en:
The original Zhou Tian Diagram, containing 365 kinds of extreme poles, has a very mysterious origin, has been auctioned, and even caused a big war.

However, in the end, there was no news.

And the inscription technique containing the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes seems to only have the original Zhou Tian diagram.

Because the most powerful inscription technique of the Voidless Heavenly Gate is only the Voidless Void Diagram, which contains the inscription techniques of the seventy-two extreme poles, and once all the seventy-two extreme extremes are successfully engraved on the Voidless Void Diagram, the Void Void Origin Ancestor Body can be formed, and the combat power will be very terrifying.

And the most powerful inscription technique of the Fivefold Holy Gate only involved one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths.

"I didn't expect the Primordial Zhou Tiantu to be so powerful, and the Five Holy Gates of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain didn't have such an inscription technique!" Ye Tian said in surprise.

Of course, since the Primordial Zhou Tiantu appeared in the Shangling Origin Domain, then there may have been a legacy here, but I don't know which Fivefold Holy Gate it is in the hands of.

However, for many Primordial Ancestors, the Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram had no value, and it was not as good as the Nine Star Diagram.

Because this kind of systematic inscription technique, if you don't practice it all, you can't condense the powerful body of the original ancestor, just like the nine-star map, after inscribed the nine extreme poles, you can condense the body of the nine-star original ancestor.

As for the Primordial Zhou Tiantu, even if it was inscribed with three hundred black characters, it still couldn't form a powerful Primordial Ancestral Body.

If you can only comprehend the nine extreme extreme paths, then cultivating the Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram is really not as good as the Nine Star Diagram.

Because of this, many of the original ancestors did not crave those awesome inscriptions.

For many Origin Ancestors, it would be very good to join the Quadruple Heavenly Gate such as the Voidless Heavenly Gate and obtain the inheritance of the Nine Star Map.

"For me, the Primordial Zhou Tiantu is the most suitable! I originally thought that the Shangling Origin Domain had a more awesome inscription technique, but now it seems that the Primordial Zhou Tiantu is more awesome, so continue to comprehend the Primordial Zhou Tiantu!"

Ye Tian decided.

In the following days, Ye Tian practiced at the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

And as a core disciple, he has the treatment of a Daozi, and he has a lot of contribution points, even if he doesn't do tasks, he can meet his own cultivation needs.

Moreover, he can also visit the Extreme Dao Monument.

The Extreme Dao Monument in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain is much better than the Extreme Dao Monument at the end of the realm, and it is even valuable to the Origin Ancestor.

What's even more exaggerated is that the Voidless Heavenly Gate actually has tens of thousands of Extreme Dao Monuments, any kind of Extreme Dao, even the Cause and Effect Extreme Dao Monument.

Therefore, here you can refer to the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect Monument, and it is not a problem to practice the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to the state of perfection.

Many of the original ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate had cultivated the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the realm of perfection, but if they wanted to cultivate the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the extreme realm, the Extreme Dao Tablet would be of no use.

"It's great to join the Voidless Heavenly Gate, not only can I copy a lot of Extreme Dao Ancestors here, but I can also comprehend other Extreme Dao Realms one by one to the Consummation Realm!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to wander around the Voidless Heavenly Gate, befriending many Origin Ancestors, and secretly copied many Extreme Dao Ancestors of the Origin Ancestors.

As time passed, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Ancestors became more and more, and many Extreme Dao Ancestors had also cultivated to the Consummation Realm one by one.

Originally, Ye Tian had also comprehended more than a hundred extreme realms of perfection, and now every once in a while, he could comprehend one extreme path to the perfection realm.

Two hundred perfections!

Three hundred perfections!

Four hundred perfections!

......

The number of Perfection Poles is increasing, and although it is impossible to improve its strength, its own foundation is increasing, and with the completion of these Poles one by one, the Endless Pole Path is becoming stronger and stronger.

Other than that.

Ye Tian used the resources of the Voidless Heavenly Gate and the treasure land to continuously improve his Extreme Dao will, causing the number of layers of the Will Pagoda to also begin to increase, and his cultivation was also improving.

Thirty tiers of Pagoda of Will!

Thirty-one Levels of Will Pagoda!

After hundreds of billions of eternal epochs, Ye Tian's Will Pagoda was raised to the thirty-third floor, and then he engraved a few black characters, and all the thirty-three layers of the Will Pagoda were engraved with black characters.

"It's too difficult to improve the will of the Extreme Dao, my Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram involves three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and I have to condense three hundred and sixty-five layers of Will Pagoda before I have to engrave all the black characters of the entire Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram. It wasn't too difficult for me to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes. But it's going to be difficult to raise the Pagoda of Will to the three hundred and sixty-fifth floor!"

Ye Tian frowned.

And he had already understood that once he broke through to the Quadruple Ancestor, there would be no way to continue to engrave the Extreme Path on the Will Pagoda, and even the number of layers of the Will Pagoda would not be able to increase.

At that time, the Pagoda of Will can continue to increase its power, but the number of layers is fixed.

Therefore, if you want to practice the inscription technique and improve the level of the Will Pagoda, you can only do it in the Triple Ancestor.

This is also the reason why the Fivefold Holy Gate only recruits the Triple Origin Ancestor at the highest, because the Triple Origin Ancestor still has plasticity, and the Quadruple Origin Ancestor has no plasticity.

Perhaps there are still supreme treasures between heaven and earth that can increase the number of layers of the fourfold ancestor will pagoda, but those supreme treasures are afraid that even the fifth-fold primordial ancestors will have to fight desperately to snatch them.

Therefore, don't expect to continue to increase the level of the Will Pagoda after breaking through the Fourfold Ancestor, and don't think about continuing to engrave the Extreme Path, neither of these can be achieved.

"I still have to find a way to obtain a treasure that can greatly improve the will of the Extreme Dao, otherwise I have been staying at the Void Heaven Gate, and I can't get such a good thing!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he could wait to enter the Void Fang Holy Gate, and maybe he could get such a treasure.

However, the next time the Void Fang Holy Gate recruited members was after the Eight Million Primordial Eras, and the Eight Million Primordial Epochs were equivalent to the Eight Hundred Billion Eternal Ages of the Realm's End.

This was too long, and he didn't want to wait so long, so he had better figure it out for himself first.

Ye Tian continued to check the information and found a treasure that was most suitable for the Triple Origin Ancestor to enhance the will of the Extreme Dao - the Origin Spirit Holy Fruit.

This thing is very valuable, once it appears, it is enough for the three original ancestors to fight, and even the four original ancestors need such a treasure.

In the Voidless Heavenly Gate, there is no way to exchange the Origin Spirit Holy Fruit.

However, Ye Tian finally got a message on this day.

"The Void God Domain is about to open!"

This is a small domain, but it is a special small domain with incomparably strong resources, which is sealed by the Fivefold Holy Gate and will only be opened once at a certain time.

And this time, both the Quadruple Heavenly Gate and the Fivefold Holy Gate could send the Triple Ancestor into it.

And in the Void God Domain, there is the Primordial Spirit Holy Fruit.

After getting the news, Ye Tian immediately applied to enter the Void God Domain.
